name: Donna Karan

acts.description: In 2017 interview suggested Weinstein accusers were 'asking for it' through the way they dressed

behavior_summary: Fashion icon who publicly victim-blamed Harvey Weinstein's accusers at the height of the MeToo revelations, then issued an apology.

art.summary: Created DKNY and defined power dressing for professional women in the 1980s and 90s. Genuinely influential in democratizing fashion.

accountability_events: 2017 stepped down from DKNY following controversy

verdict.blurb: She asked whether Weinstein's accusers were 'asking for it' and then apologized. She's no longer running her label. The clothes were fine. The comment was not.
